pr.title: Record: 11L XSA + EMA + TTT + Partial RoPE + LN Scale — val_bpb=1.1401

output.summary: Stacked transformer uses last-layer Exclusive Self Attention, EMA smoothing, U-Net skips, TTT refinement, Partial RoPE/LN scale, SmearGate/BigramHash, and late int6 QAT.
output.valOnlyReasoning: Standard training with post-training validation tweaks; no val-only training regime.
techniques: XSA + U-Net skip connections reshaping attention outputs
EMA smoothing with 3-epoch Test-Time Training before eval
Partial RoPE + LN Scale with late absmax int6 QAT and auxiliary SmearGate/BigramHash
